nasb.text: How then can you repulse one official of the least of my master’s servants and rely on Egypt for chariots and for horsemen?

esv.text: How then can you repulse a single captain among the least of my master’s servants, when you trust in Egypt for chariots and for horsemen?

cnv.text: 若不能，你怎能擊退我主的臣僕中最小的軍長呢？你竟倚靠埃及的戰車和馬兵嗎？

ccb.text: 你们即使依靠埃及的战车和骑兵，又怎能打败我主人的一个最小的将领呢？

csbs.text: 如果不能，你怎能击退我主的臣仆中至小的一个军官呢？你竟敢依靠埃及的战车和马兵！
